title: Decisions, Pattern Matching, and Iteration · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Route support requests through priority rules, repeated records, and changed data conditions. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a support-request routing engine after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict truth testing, chained comparisons, equality, identity, membership, and Boolean operator results.
Use if, elif, else, conditional expressions, and guard clauses to express exclusive and early-exit decisions.
Use match and case for structural patterns, captures, guards, alternatives, and exhaustive fallback behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-basics cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: python control flow. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Python Loop Control trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use break, continue, loop else, and nested-loop extraction without skipping required work or hiding termination.

content.text: For Python Loop Control, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

stimulus.title: Python Loop Control case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use break, continue, loop else, and nested-loop extraction without skipping required work or hiding termination. Artifact under review: a complete first version of a support-request routing engine while every earlier competency remains active.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Python Loop Control, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Python Loop Control applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use break, continue, loop else, and nested-loop extraction without skipping required work or hiding termination.
